headline: How Surging Earnings Expectations and Insider Selling May Shape Valero Energy’s (VLO) Valuation Debate
summary: In recent days, Valero Energy has drawn attention as analysts project very large year-over-year earnings growth and the company prepares to discuss its second-quarter 2026 results on a July 30 conference call. At the same time, concerns have emerged over an apparently rich valuation and recent insider selling, creating a tension between optimism about near-term earnings and caution over the price being paid for that potential. With expectations for very large earnings growth and a strong buy...
